watchlist.symbol.en: Core14 ticker — click row to open blackboard.

watchlist.atr_pct.en: Average true range % — vol context for sizing.

watchlist.cost.en: Estimated round-trip cost in BRL including slip buffer.

watchlist.reset_sort.en: Reset column sort to default idea-score ranking.

watchlist.bias.en: Row color — green long bias, red short, neutral flat.

watchlist.futures.en: WIN/WDO mini futures — cyan row + B3 session badge (open/pre/closed).
